overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing a female character with short black hair walking through a futuristic, minimalist residential interior. The character moves continuously from a storage pantry area through a transitional kitchenette and into a main kitchen via an archway doorway, featuring sleek metallic surfaces and ambient lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic storage pantry with metal shelving

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a storage pantry area, passing shelves containing glassware and containers

collection of wine glasses and drinking glasses arranged on the left shelf
small metallic containers and a copper mug sitting on the central shelf
tall silver cocktail shaker positioned on the central shelf
large white cooler box with latches sitting on the lower shelf
blue plastic container on the floor in front of the shelving
green fabric-covered storage box on the right side of the shelving

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow futuristic storage pantry with black metal shelving units containing various household items including glassware, metal canisters, and coolers. The space is artificially lit with a cool color tone, featuring marble flooring and enclosed walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: kitchenette with sink and metallic backsplash

events.description: moving from enclosed storage pantry into kitchenette area with visible sink and countertop

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past the shelving units toward the kitchen sink and counter area

entered.detail: modern kitchen sink with faucet set into a dark countertop
textured metallic backsplash paneling behind the sink reflecting light
dark stone or composite countertop running along the right wall
small refrigerator or display cabinet with glass doors and interior lighting
flat screen display mounted on the wall near the doorway
modern metallic trash can with dual compartments
futuristic archway doorway leading to another room visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the storage area into a kitchenette featuring a sink with metallic backsplash, dark countertops, and a glass-door cabinet. An archway doorway becomes visible ahead leading to the main kitchen, while the storage shelving falls behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: main kitchen area with modern appliances

events.description: passing through the archway doorway into the main kitchen space

agents.ego_description: walking through the archway doorway and entering the main kitchen area with modern cabinetry

entered.detail: sleek white and gray kitchen cabinetry with integrated handles lining the walls
modern coffee machine or beverage station on the kitchen counter
light-colored kitchen countertop surface in the main kitchen area

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the archway doorway into a spacious main kitchen featuring modern white cabinetry, a coffee station, and light countertops. The previous kitchenette elements including the sink and trash can are left behind as the character enters the new space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a minimalist futuristic residence, transitioning from a confined storage area into a bright, open kitchen. It begins in a narrow storage pantry with cool artificial lighting, moving past black metal shelving units filled with glassware and canisters over marble flooring. As the character advances, the space opens into a kitchenette featuring dark countertops and a metallic backsplash, while the storage shelves recede behind the camera. The scene then shifts as the character passes through an archway doorway, leaving the sink and kitchenette elements behind. Finally, the environment expands into a spacious main kitchen characterized by modern white cabinetry, light countertops, and a dedicated coffee station.
